calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-08-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Cassandra Coats, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff John Stewart Company.
Paul Arshawsky representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Jaleta Jones is present.
Sylvia Covarrubias representing the defendant.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 4 Dedman Court, San Francisco, California 94124.

This case settled, the trial date of 4/13/09 is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218)
